SubTests.sub_Test_Description: Test UEFI RT service set wakeup time interface.
SubTests.Reason:
A bug in Linux v6.10 causes false positive on getwakeuptime call.
This has been fixed in later versions of Linux: https://github.com/torvalds/linux/commit/3dcb524d785373fd43b129f01f32bd394fe167e0

A bug in fwts V25.01.00 causes false positive on disabled cores.
This has been fixed in later versions of fwts: https://github.com/fwts/fwts/commit/4098744507f832ee1417476f2c5ee118b54828c2
